title: settale
description: A Minecraft Story Mode and Vanilla inspired modpack to enchant your gameplay without making it too complicated
body:
![Is that a lama?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db0ed2f6ccda0511e2b81cdfd683e16ac3cfebf.jpeg)





<details>
<summary>About</summary>

Created modpack to keep classic simple mechanics, but being inspired by Minecraft Story Mode and older versions of Vanilla Minecraft

First reason to create modpack was for own needs, because i really didnt find any modpacks for java that remind me of that aura Minecraft Story Mode has.
Then, i thought that i like to collect modpacks, and maybe i would be able to find my group of people who will like my work and show their support.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Controls</summary>

Movement **W A S D** 

Perspective **R**

Screenshot **RShift**


</details>



<details>
<summary>Mods and Resourcepacks containing</summary>

To see all the used mods and resourcepacks, go to the versions download section, click on the name of version you want to look at, then scroll down page and there you will see it. 

</details>


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

### > World generation

A few mods for world generation were combined to create new and unique landscapes that might remind you of old classic minecraft, however some structures were removed, some new was added and vanilla ones got a new look

- Removed Villages and Pillagers outposts
- Added new abandoned structures you will meet as you explore the map
- Vanilla structures now looks different
- Nether generation has changed
- Ender dragon island looks different now
- Farlands now will appear in all 3 dimensions

### > Items and Entities containing

- Villagers, Pillagers, Witches now has new animations and textures
- Player now has new animations
- Some blocks and items textures got a little change without getting out of minecraft visuals

### > Other stuff

Majority of modpack contains little mods for improving visuals and gameplay 
**|Optimisation mods, New sounds, New combat system, BorderFog, Bigger tools and bow, New camera perspective, More clouds etc|**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Support</summary>

Hello there, wanted to say thank you for getting there, if i get any support, i will appreciate it and hope i get this modpack to point where it got a little popular so i can make some other modpacks and update this one.



</details>
